name: croydon-second-site
note: Eval case: a real nursery second-site question. Scored on soundness + grounding + backtest agreement, NOT against a fixed 'correct' answer.

brief.business_profile: Independent day nursery, 1 Outstanding setting in Shirley, Croydon; ~£600k revenue; owner-led; 4 staff.
brief.strategic_question: Where in Croydon should we open our second day nursery to maximise occupancy?
brief.current_situation: Strong waiting list at the existing setting; no formal demand data; scouting by word of mouth.
brief.goals_and_metrics: 85%+ occupancy within 12 months; break even by month 9.
brief.key_constraints: Budget for a 50-place setting; stay within Croydon; 12-month timeline.
brief.competitive_context: Several nearby nurseries; unsure which areas are under-served.
brief.client_hypotheses: North of the borough may be under-supplied.
